title: ShuiShui Goes to School
subtitle: 不想上学的早晨,却变成超棒的一天
moral: 哭闹不能解决问题，试着勇敢走出去，可能会遇见意想不到的快乐。

pages.narration: 早晨，太阳照进小屋。水水坐在门口，眼泪吧嗒吧嗒掉。
pages.composition_hint: shuishui wiping tears by the home entryway, a larger white rabbit in a yellow floral dress standing beside her holding a tissue, warm morning light and a small backpack on the floor.

pages.narration: 妈妈没有着急，她轻轻递来纸巾。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 水水生病这几天没上课，今天差不多好啦，就该去幼儿园咯。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 哭没有用，哭不解决问题，我们来想个办法。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui holding a tissue, the larger white rabbit in a yellow floral dress standing calmly nearby, both beside a tidy entry bench and a round wall clock.

pages.narration: 妈妈数了数手指，声音软软的。今天周四，明天周五，再过两天就是周末啦。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 王老师都说想水水了，好几天没看到你啦。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 再哭下去，就赶不上热狗、发糕和小馄饨啦！

pages.composition_hint: close view of shuishui with teary eyes starting to listen, a larger white rabbit in a yellow floral dress holding up two fingers, small breakfast picture stickers nearby.

pages.narration: 水水吸吸鼻子，把眼泪擦干净。她背上小书包，和妈妈一起出门。
pages.composition_hint: shuishui walking into a colorful kindergarten gate with a backpack, a larger white rabbit in a yellow floral dress walking beside her, a GIANT PANDA teacher without glasses greeting them at the doorway.

pages.narration: 幼儿园里香喷喷的。水水吃到了热乎乎的早饭，肚子暖暖的。
pages.composition_hint: shuishui seated at a small classroom table with a plate of hot dog, steamed cake, and wontons, a GIANT PANDA teacher without glasses serving breakfast, bear and squirrel animal pupils eating happily.

pages.narration: 吃完早饭，大家排排坐。中班的哥哥姐姐要演绘本剧啦！

dialogue.speaker: wanglaoshi
dialogue.text: 今天我们看《小红帽和大灰狼》。

pages.composition_hint: a kindergarten hall with a small stage and red curtains, shuishui sitting with bear and squirrel animal pupils, a GIANT PANDA teacher without glasses at the side, bear, pig, elephant, and squirrel performers waiting on stage.

pages.narration: 小红帽来了，篮子晃呀晃。大灰狼也来了，头套圆圆的，一点也不可怕。
pages.composition_hint: shuishui watching with bright eyes in the foreground, a bear performer wearing a red hooded cape holding a small basket and a pig performer wearing a soft gray wolf headpiece with friendly round eyes on the stage.

pages.narration: 音乐响起来，哥哥姐姐们一起跳兔子舞。水水的小耳朵也跟着一晃一晃。
pages.composition_hint: bear, pig, elephant, and squirrel performers dancing in a cheerful line on colorful floor mats, shuishui and animal pupils watching and clapping from small seats.

pages.narration: 快放学时，刘老师拿出一个大大的袋子。原来是给水水的儿童节礼物！

dialogue.speaker: liulaoshi
dialogue.text: 水水，这是你的饼干礼物。

pages.composition_hint: a GIRAFFE teacher without glasses holding a large bag of cookies near a row of small classroom cubbies, shuishui reaching to receive the cookies with a happy smile.

pages.narration: 水水把饼干放进自己的小柜子里。她拍拍柜门，好像把快乐也放了进去。
pages.composition_hint: shuishui placing a large bag of cookies into a small cubby with a name label, a GIRAFFE teacher without glasses standing nearby and watching warmly.

pages.narration: 放学啦，姥姥来接水水。她们说说笑笑，走到半路，水水忽然停住了。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 哎呀！刘老师给的饼干忘拿啦！

pages.composition_hint: shuishui with wide surprised eyes beside a sheep with white curly wool and a linen shirt, a compact pale blue electric scooter parked near a sidewalk flowerbed.

pages.narration: 姥姥立刻骑上电动小摩托，带着水水回幼儿园。小摩托嗡嗡嗡，风也轻轻吹。

dialogue.speaker: laolao
dialogue.text: 别急，我们现在就回去拿！

pages.composition_hint: extreme close view of shuishui holding the handlebar area of a compact pale blue electric scooter, a sheep with white curly wool and a linen shirt riding with her along a tree-lined street.

pages.narration: 刘老师还在教室里忙着。水水打开小柜子，哈哈，饼干还在！
pages.composition_hint: shuishui taking a large bag of cookies from a small cubby, a GIRAFFE teacher without glasses standing by a classroom table, a sheep with white curly wool and a linen shirt standing near the doorway.

pages.narration: 回到家，水水拆开饼干，咔嚓咬了一口。真香呀！

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 幸好我今天去幼儿园了！

pages.composition_hint: close view of shuishui smiling and eating a cookie at a cozy dining table, a sheep with white curly wool and a linen shirt placing the opened cookie bag on a small plate.

pages.narration: 今天有热乎乎的早饭，有好看的演出，还有香香的礼物。水水想：明天，我还要去上学！
pages.composition_hint: shuishui packing her small backpack beside a sofa, a larger white rabbit in a yellow floral dress and a sheep with white curly wool and a linen shirt standing nearby, an open cookie bag and a picture book on the table.
